place: Berawa, Tibubeneng, North Kuta, Badung, Bali, Indonesia
title: Mandala Estate — Multi-Villa Group Retreat, Canggu
note: Per villa per night · book one or all
blurb: A designer multi-villa estate in the heart of Berawa — anchored by the five-bedroom Mandala Oasis with its rooftop cinema, swim-up-bar pool and gym, alongside three-bedroom Mandala Residences, for group travel that balances togetherness and space.
detail:
Mandala Estate invites you to experience Canggu in style, at your own pace and always in good company — group travel, elevated, where shared moments flow effortlessly alongside the luxury of personal space. Anchoring the estate is Mandala Oasis, a striking five-bedroom sanctuary where bold design meets barefoot elegance, with a rooftop cinema, a private gym and pilates room, an ice bath and sauna, and a 26-metre infinity pool with a swim-up bar.

Just steps away are Mandala Residences — a collection of three-bedroom villas that give your group more room to spread out yet stay connected, each with its own serene living and dining spaces and private pool. Whether you reserve a single villa or the entire estate, you enjoy seamless flexibility paired with attentive in-villa staff: book more villas to unlock more space and amenities, up to 17 guests across the whole estate.

Days unfold slowly here — mornings by the pool, leisurely communal lunches, and evenings that drift from one beautiful villa to the next. Best of all, you're perfectly placed in one of Bali's most sought-after enclaves: a stroll from vibrant restaurants and beach clubs along Berawa, and only a four-minute drive from the golden sands of Berawa Beach.

features.l: Five villas · book one or all
Up to 17 guests · 4 min to Berawa Beach
